title: Repair Car Pack [Immersive Vehicles/IV/MTS]
description: Pack for Immersive vehicles for Customize your car however you like, with a wide range of tuning and parts available!
body:
## Customize your car however you like, with a wide range of tuning and parts available!
## 
## Lancer Evo VIII Pack – Build your own unique Mitsubishi in Minecraft
![Lancer Evo VIII](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a960758acf2acc35b83ac80c4348908023912c90.png)
## Spoilers, doors, hoods, thresholds, headlights, bumpers and much more.
![Lancer Evo VIII](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893ef72e365164006a2490e74f05ea7a5866745d.png)
![Lancer Evo VIII](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4777acef2f96328af28cac63af44e70c97c37200.png) 
Some JSON scripts were made by Max the author of KaminariMotorWorks
